summary: Outstanding Oade AUD capture of a high‑energy show highlighted by a smoking Shakedown and stellar Bird Song, with crisp, deep sound quality.
review: The audience PCM recorded by the Oade brothers delivers crystal‑clear, resonant audio that many reviewers rate as better than most SBDs.  Musically the concert shines on the first set – especially Shakedown, TLEO and Bird Song – while the second set has mixed moments (a strong start with Shakedown and Women but a dip with Ship of Fools and Supplication).

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high star ratings (mostly 4‑5) praise both the audio fidelity and the performance, with only a few moderate critiques of the second set.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Praised as crisp, tight, bright and deep; many say it surpasses typical SBDs. No major drop‑outs or noise reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is consistently strong and energetic; second set opens well with Shakedown and Women but loses momentum after Ship of Fools, ending with an unremarkable post‑drums segment.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Mid‑range leads and a sweet ‘Tiger’ tone are highlighted; vocal issues noted but guitar work praised.
band_member_comments.Phil: Thundering bass described as resonant and powerful throughout the room.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s descanting arpeggios over Jerry’s leads on Bird Song receive specific praise.
